chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-927 of 2023 Crl. Bail Application No.S-43 of 2024 Crl. Bail Application No.S-112 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of bail application 01-03-2024 M/s Aamir Ali Bhutto, Muhammad Uzair Shaikh, and M.A. Qureshi, Advocates for applicants. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G a/w complainant. ***** After hearing these bail applications, they are disposed of with consent in the terms, whereby the trial Court is directed to examine complainant by framing charge within a period of one and half month without fail. Thereafter, applicants would be at liberty to file applications for bail before the trial Court, which, if filed, shall be decided on its own merits in the light of evidence of complainant, independent of the impugned order. Listed bail applications are disposed of accordingly. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matters. JUDGE Ahmad
